exemple.Description: Q. What does abutment of the nerve root mean?
exemple.Patient: Hi doctor,I am just wondering what is abutting and abutment of the nerve root means in a back issue. Please explain. What treatment is required for annular bulging and tear?
exemple.Doctor: Hi. I have gone through your query with diligence and would like you to know that I am here to help you. For further information consult a neurologist online -->
